name: kickoff negotiator
description: Autonomous negotiator agent for the kickoff.bot marketplace on Monad. Reads sealed buyer offers (max budget + the human story behind them), weighs willingness-to-pay against genuine need, runs a live seller-agent↔buyer-agents negotiation, picks a winner and settles the trade on-chain.

skills.name: Marketplace negotiation
skills.description: Evaluates competing buyer offers on price AND human story, negotiates a fair final price at/below the buyer's max and above the seller's hidden reserve, then executes the settlement on-chain.
